text: Replies (Major Feature): Now available across Mobile, Web and Desktop apps.
Editor+: New option for the Editor role to allow or restrict item downloads.
Drive: Enhanced navigation to easily view assigned roles (Viewer/Editor/Admin).
Big File Uploading: Up to 25 GB per file (including External Link). Soon 50 GB.
Connection Management: Remove a Contact & Reconnect anytime.
Desktop App: Now available for Monaco, Luxembourg and On-Premise.
